description: Reconcile authoritative opportunity registry: backfill all 9 evaluated opportunities (OPP-001..008 + OPP-001b) into opportunity_registry.json via registry.sh add, link existing research files, reindex INDEX.md. Fixes binding-rule violation: registry was empty so dedup checkpoint non-functional and mandated reindex would wipe hand-maintained INDEX.md.
acceptance: opportunity_registry.json contains all 9 evaluated opportunities (was empty)
registry.sh search returns hits for prior sectors (dedup checkpoint functional)
each backfilled record links its existing research/TASK-*.md detail file
research/INDEX.md regenerated from the registry (no longer hand-maintained), all 9 present
OPPORTUNITIES.md carries a legacy-id -> OPP-YYYY-NNN crosswalk
notes: Stabilization/handoff-integrity cycle (cf. ADR-016). Registry was initialized 2026-06-01 and never populated; org used hand-maintained OPPORTUNITIES.md + INDEX.md instead, violating the binding research-dedup rule and leaving a landmine where a mandated registry.sh reindex would overwrite INDEX.md with an empty index.
